generation_disclosure: Retained recorded reference candidates validate the benchmark protocol only. They do not prove live model causality, agent obedience, or generalized performance.

tasks.prompt: Add enqueueAll(values) to accept any iterable, enqueue every value in iteration order, preserve undefined values, return void, update TypeScript declarations, and avoid unrelated changes.

Add dequeueMany(count) that requires a non-negative integer, returns up to count values in FIFO order, preserves undefined values, never pads after the queue empties, updates size, updates TypeScript declarations, and avoids unrelated changes.
Add toArray() that returns a front-to-back snapshot, preserves undefined values, does not mutate the queue, returns a detached array, updates TypeScript declarations, and avoids unrelated changes.

failed_runs.failure_reason: No count validation and result padding after the queue empties.
